title: Graceful worker deadline
description: Per-job graceful deadline (AI_JOB_DEADLINE_MS) in the durable AI worker: a job that outruns its time budget is routed to manual_review BEFORE the function is hard-killed, so it never strands in 'processing'.
rollbackSteps: Rollback: git revert -m 1 a8e0584ff0ef390a4baf6cda8ebdd4bed6885aac (the PR #8 merge). Worker deadline defaults are env-overridable and safe; behavior degrades gracefully.
Revert the sync commit; the deadline defaults are safe (env-overridable).
compatibilityNotes: Pure backend worker logic — no branding. Direct port; verify the downstream cron maxDuration is >= the deadline.

history.note: Registered from completed upstream worker hardening.

Landed in the Supercharged parity release PR #8 (8098d35 graceful worker deadline + run budget); bundle re-verified green (tsc/462 tests/117 ai/regression/build, flags OFF) and merged as a8e0584ff0ef390a4baf6cda8ebdd4bed6885aac. Discovery→merged recorded as a bundled reconciliation transition (the parity foundation was validated and merged as one unit).

verification.summary: PR #8 bundle re-verified against head da5fdc8: tsc 0 errors; eslint changed-files 0 errors (2 pre-existing warnings); full suite 462/462; test:ai 117/117; ai-regression 2/2; next build ✓ compiled successfully; all new flags default OFF (flag-off = byte-identical).
